purpose: Example status snapshot configuration for displaying orchestration summaries without changing state.

status_inputs.fallback_behavior: Prefer canonical paths. If a legacy fallback is missing, report that the canonical source was used instead of failing.

safety_rules: Do not create files from this script.
Do not modify files from this script.
Do not launch packets, validators, workers, recovery actions, or external processes.
No broker, OANDA, API keys, webhooks, real orders, or live trading.
next_safe_action: Review the orchestration status snapshot, then run git status --short --branch before any separate approval workflow.
